title: 4K Action Camera Sport Video Waterproof Wifi 1080P HD Cam 170° Remote For Go Pro
shortDescription: It’s designed for outdoor adventures like climbing, cycling, skiing, diving, snorkeling, surfing, and more. Lens: 4K + 170° wide-angle. Ideal for sports like skiing, surfing, snorkeling, and more. Built-in WiFi Connectivity.
description:
4K Action Camera Sport Video Waterproof Wifi

Description

100% Brand New


Note: Please fully charge the camera before using it for the first time.


Color: Black

 

This action camera offers ultra HD 4K / 1080P / 720P video recording, enabling you to capture stunning footage with high resolution and smooth frame rates. It’s designed for outdoor adventures like climbing, cycling, skiing, diving, snorkeling, surfing, and more. With an included camera mount, you can conveniently attach it to your helmet or bike handlebars to record and capture every moment effortlessly.


Features:

Real 4K Ultra HD Action Camera:  

Capture incredible photos and videos with 4K 25fps and 1080P 30fps, documenting every wonder and detail in ultra-high definition.


Built-in WiFi Connectivity:  

Easily share and edit videos or photos. Download the free app (GOtrack) to control the camera and preview content directly from your smartphone or tablet.


30M Waterproof Performance:  

The included waterproof case lets you dive up to 30 meters, perfect for underwater selfies, snorkeling, and other aquatic adventures.


Multiple Shooting Modes:  

Enjoy features like camera timer, loop recording, and slow-motion to capture any moment just as you want it.


170° Wide-Angle Lens:  

Expand your field of view with the wide-angle lens, perfect for capturing expansive scenes and group shots.


Long Battery Life:  

Equipped with 900mAh batteries, each can record up to 60 minutes of 4K video, ensuring you never miss a special moment.


Full Accessories Kit:  

Includes a wide range of mounts and accessories, suitable for a variety of activities such as diving, cycling, climbing, and gliding.


Versatile Outdoor Application:  

Ideal for sports like skiing, surfing, snorkeling, and more. Whether on land or underwater, it’s the perfect adventure companion.


Specifications:  

Display: 2.0” LTPS LCD  

Lens: 4K + 170° wide-angle  

Languages Supported: English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Traditional & Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Russian  

Video Resolutions:  

- 4K (4096 x 2160) @ 25fps  

- 1080P (1920 x 1080) @ 30fps  

- 720P (1280 x 720) @ 30fps  


Photo Resolutions: 16M / 12M / 10M / 8M / 5M (JPEG)  

Video Format: AVI (MJPG Compression)  

Storage: Micro SDHC, Class 10 Recommended, Up to 64GB (SD card not included)  

Shooting Modes: Single, Timer (3s–60s), Continuous Shooting  

Loop Recording: Supported  

Connectivity: USB 2.0, micro HDMI (Type D)  

Power Supply: 5V/1A  

Battery: 3.7V 900mAh Li-ion (up to 60 minutes recording per charge)  

Item Weight: 65g (with battery), 39g (without battery)  

Charging Time: Approx. 3 hours   


Tips for Best Performance:  

- A Micro SDHC card (Class 10, up to 64GB) is required but not included. Format the card in the camera before use.  

- Fully charge the battery (2–3 hours) before use for up to 60–90 minutes of video recording, depending on resolution.  


Q&A:  

1. Unable to connect WiFi?  

- Format your Micro SD card, then unzip the provided software to the SD card and insert it into the camera.  

- Turn the camera on and wait for it to automatically shut off. Remove the SD card and turn the camera back on to check if the issue persists.


2. Battery not lasting long?  

- Charge the battery for 3–4 hours before use for extended performance.


Package Contents
  • 1x 4K Sports Action Camera  
  • 1x Remote Control  
  • 1x 900mAh Battery  
  • 1x Waterproof Case
